on_interested_reply.step_1: Write reply to data/new_replies.json immediately. Include full raw text. Timestamp it.
on_interested_reply.step_2: Classify in data/reply_classifications.json as INTERESTED with full reasoning.
on_interested_reply.step_3: Cancel Day-14 send for this lead (use proposal flow instead — do NOT send breakup to an interested lead).
on_interested_reply.step_4: Prepare bespoke proposal within 24h (from reply time — 24/7). Match scope to their signal. Give 3 options (see value_delivery_on_interested below).
on_interested_reply.step_7: Add new entry to batch_5_interested_leads array in this file.

ssl_trades.option_a: SSL certificate fix only — £75-100 one-off. Quick entry point, lowest friction.
ssl_trades.option_b: SSL + mobile fix — £150-200 one-off. Recommended entry point for Ryedale trades.
ssl_trades.option_c: SSL + mobile + local SEO optimisation (title tags, meta, Google Business Profile) — £300-350 one-off. Full fix.
ssl_trades.lead_with: Option B as the recommended option. Option A as quick-fix minimum. Option C as full-service upsell.
ssl_trades.framing: 'Small job, fast turnaround. Here are three options — most Ryedale businesses I've worked with go for Option B.'

no_website_rural.option_a: Single-page contact site — £300 one-off. Gets them found immediately.
no_website_rural.option_b: 5-page site + contact form + Google Business Profile setup — £500 one-off. The full package.
no_website_rural.option_c: Option B + 3 months local SEO — £550 one-off + £75/month. Builds ranking over time.
no_website_rural.lead_with: Option B for most Ryedale rural businesses (20+ reviews = social proof already exists).
no_website_rural.reference_maps: Reference their Google Maps listing as social proof — 'You already have X reviews, the site just needs to catch up.'

aida_high_review.option_a: On-page SEO (title tags, meta, Google Business Profile optimisation) — £150-200 one-off.
aida_high_review.option_b: Option A + one month of local citation building — £250 one-off.
aida_high_review.note: AIDA leads (4.5★+ 100+ reviews) — keyword-gap fix only. Do not upsell redesign.

proposal_copy_rules.personalisation: Reference their exact signal and exact URL/issue from Day-0 email. Do not use a generic proposal template.
proposal_copy_rules.framing: Small job, fast turnaround, local specialist. Not 'digital marketing agency'. Not 'web design company'.
proposal_copy_rules.options: Always give 2-3 options — let them self-select. Reduces friction and negotiation back-and-forth.
proposal_copy_rules.price_anchoring: Lead with Option B as recommended. Mention Option A as quick-fix minimum. Option C as full-service upsell.
proposal_copy_rules.proof: Reference Yorkshire businesses helped — 'I've done this for other local businesses in North Yorkshire.' Do not name them.
proposal_copy_rules.call_to_action: Offer a 15-minute call to talk through options. Not a discovery call. Not a consultation. 15 minutes.
proposal_copy_rules.urgency: Do not manufacture urgency. Their reply IS the signal — respect it, respond promptly.

lessons_applied_to_batch_5.single_pain_point: One signal per proposal option. Rob's redesign ask came from a single clear mobile/SSL signal.
lessons_applied_to_batch_5.options_not_quotes: Present 3 options, not a single quote. Reduces friction. Let them self-select.
lessons_applied_to_batch_5.weekend_response: 24h SLA runs from reply time — not from next business day. Applies 24/7.
